Our Story

We believe the food
you remember most
is the food someone made for you.

That is why our founder started Ugly Donuts & Corn Dogs. As a boy in Korea, his mother would buy him a corn dog from a small stand on the way home. It was warm. It was hers.

That single memory is what we are trying to give back, one warm corn dog at a time.

Read Our Story
a memory of warmth.
Fresh dough, mixed daily.
The Craft

Simple ingredients.
Honest process.
Better taste.

We mix fresh dough every single morning, in every single store. By hand. From scratch. No shortcuts, no powders, no pre-mixed bases.

Every corn dog is hand-rolled and battered. Every donut shaped by hand. And every order is fried fresh in 100% avocado oil — the moment you order it.

The Menu

Our menu of Korean corn dogs & donuts.

Twelve corn dog varieties. Fifteen handmade donuts. Signature drinks. All made one at a time. Items and prices vary by location.

menu launching soon

We are photographing every corn dog and donut the way we make them. Until the full menu is up, you can order online from your nearest store.

Franchise

Open a Korean corn dog franchise in your city.

Premium Korean corn dogs is a category open in nearly every U.S. metro. If you are an experienced operator and the position is right for you, we would like to talk.
